name: DNA: Episode 5
short_description: DNA 1 is a hand drawn episodic beat up up anime game created by a Solo Developer. Play as the protagonist Leo, a genetically modified with Extraterrestrial life Elite Nova Corp Troop, as he faces challenges on what path he must take to change his life. Thus begins the epic story of DNA!
detailed_description:
See an Epic Finale Come to a Close...




DNA Episode 5 is the Season 1 Finale of DNA as Leo is summoned by Nova Corp to train Nova Troops in Hease City. As he arrives Leo's life completely changes.

Oceana Island Awaits...


  • Enter a beautiful island region readied with its protectors.

  • Seek out your past in an epic finale to mark your future...

  • Battle the dangerous protectors of the Oceana, the mighty Oceanans...


Make your Mark in the Epic Finale...


  • Finish off the finale with DNA's epic 2D Beat'em up gameplay with new abilities to acquire!

  • Continue playing a challenging gameplay formula building upon previous Episodes' rewarding difficulties.

  • Fight stout new enemies as your traverse through the Oceana!


Witness the Season Finale to a Remarkable Storyline...


  • Watch as the story develops further into intriguing events in Episode 5 of DNA.

  • Reunite with your old friend and mentor, former nova-corp troop now made protector of his home islands; Zublimus.

  • Flow through the episode with even more action-packed gameplay, and intriguing cinematics.
